{{Infobox group
| name = Union
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Union Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] is the most expansive interplanetary government within civilized space, centered around the human birthplace at the heart of the galaxy. Its territory includes human space, the [[Dornoth system]], and the [[Aethril]], though its control is sometimes described as nominal in certain regions. The Union maintains a vast communication network known as the [[Subline]], which connects billions of people. Its military presence is characterized by a preference for gray aesthetics and utilizes specialized power-armored soldiers known as Burrow Guardians. While some view the Union as a potential force for good that could provide stability through cooperation, others see it as an entity that has pursued galactic dominance through civil war and secret operations. Internal and external politics heavily influence the Union. It is led by President [[Telappen Vashei]], a human woman described as stern yet kind. However, there are significant claims that the organization is actually manipulated by a shadow group called [[Solstice]], which may engineer chaos to justify Union intervention. The Union is currently engaged in a long-standing conflict with the [[Iron Legion]] and maintains complex, sometimes tense relationships with other groups like the [[Karoshan Alliance]]. Additionally, splinter factions from previous Union takeovers exist in [[Dark Space]], seeking to reclaim lost territory.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Union functions as a military and political entity that includes the [[Aethril]]. As an organization, it serves as a source from which ships may be borrowed. The Union also facilitated [[Professor Vallenar]]'s presence at the [[Magic Tower]] and exists as a territory that can be traveled deeper into.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Union]] is a military/political entity.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Union]] is a group from which ships can be borrowed.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11">''The Captain'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Union]] allowed [[Professor Vallenar]] to be at the [[Magic Tower]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Union]] is a location or entity that can be traveled deeper into.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Aethril]] are part of the [[Union]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Information from the [[Union]] is considered scarce by [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Union]] is a group mentioned by Shyrax.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator materializes on the bridge of a [[Union]] battleship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Sola]] has contacts within the [[Union]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Rifles issued by the [[Union]] are magically shielded.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Union]] treats certain planet contact losses as [[Iron Legion]] attacks.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A fleet of [[Union]] forces accompanied the [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Union is a long-standing entity that has been engaged in warfare against the [[Iron Legion]] for centuries. While [[Solstice]] maintains influence over everyone within the organization, the group contains various insurrectionist elements and has been linked to the destruction of the [[Zenith]] Starship. The Union's involvement in matters concerning [[Karosha]] has faced scrutiny, and its military forces have been seen firing upon [[The Last Horizon]]. Furthermore, the group's actions have turned [[Mariala]] and her fellow students into fugitives.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The characters are discussing the [[Union military]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] has influence over everyone in the [[Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5">''The Pilot'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Union]] is a group or entity mentioned in relation to the [[Zenith]] Starship's destruction.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Union]] has insurrectionist elements.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Union]] has been fighting the [[Iron Legion]] for centuries.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Mariala]] and her fellow students are now [[Union]] fugitives.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Union]] has ships that are firing on [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Union]] is a business or entity being questioned in relation to [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Information from the Union is scarce, and our relays should be connecting to their Subline any minute now.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“They question how this Union business can be for the good of Karosha.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
